metadata.description: Inter-agent communication for Claude Code via A2A protocol

plugins.name: bridgey
plugins.description: Inter-agent communication via A2A protocol with Tailscale mesh discovery — send messages, discover agents, manage inbox

plugins.name: bridgey-discord
plugins.description: Discord bot bridge for bridgey — route Discord channel messages to Claude Code agents via A2A

plugins.name: bridgey-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy agents to remote servers as Docker containers with Tailscale SSH, Coolify integration, and bidirectional sync
